A member of [[Darth Krayt]]'s [[One Sith]], this '''[[Quarren/Legends|Quarren]] [[Sith/Legends|Sith]]''' was one of many Sith led by [[Darth Nihl]] in the [[Massacre at Ossus]] in [[130 ABY]], purging the [[Jedi Academy (Ossus)|Jedi Praxeum]] on [[Ossus/Legends|Ossus]] and scattering the [[New Jedi Order]]. However, the Quarren Sith was killed by [[Kol Skywalker]] before the end of the battle.<ref name="Legacy" />

*[[Legacy (2006) 1|''Legacy'' (2006) 1]] {{1st}}
